# Rules for src-tauri/src/proxy/codex/auth.rs

<!-- Generated by proofd. Source: src-tauri/src/proxy/codex/auth.rs. Do not edit manually. -->

## Provider Routing (provider-routing)
Session-bound provider routing, OpenAI Codex provider config, and auth-backed request translation.

- [PR-02] OpenAI Codex is exposed as a predefined openai_codex provider with default primary/small models and per-family mappings; ProvidersPane shows OAuth login/logout state, SessionLauncher blocks non-utility Codex launches until auth is available, and the Rust adapter translates Anthropic-style requests and streaming responses through the OpenAI Responses API.
